papers.title_en: Multi-view Chest X-Ray Vision-Language Pre-training via Semantic-Aware Masked Language Modeling and High-order Alignment
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胸部X射线视觉语言预训练中多视图信息利用不足的问题，提出了一种创新的预训练框架。该框架通过语义感知掩码语言建模捕捉报告中的关键医学概念，并利用高阶对齐技术强化多视图图像与文本间的复杂关联。实验证明，该方法显著提升了医学影像诊断的准确性，为多模态医学数据处理提供了新的视角和高效的表征学习方案。
papers.abstract_en: Chest X-Ray Vision-Language pretraining (VLP) leverages large-scale radiograph-report pairs to develop joint image-text representations, demonstrating significantpotential for medical image diagnosis. However, existing VLP approaches often …

papers.title_en: Beyond Inconsistent Reasoning: Intermediate Process Direct Preference Optimization on Small Multi-modal Large Language Models for Visual Question Answering
papers.tldr: 针对小型多模态大模型（Small MLLMs）在视觉问答中推理过程与答案不一致的问题，本文提出了中间过程直接偏好优化（IP-DPO）方法。该方法通过对多模态思维链（MCoT）的中间推理步骤进行偏好对齐，引导模型生成逻辑严密且与结论一致的推理路径，有效解决了“对题错因”等逻辑断层问题，显著提升了小模型在复杂视觉任务中的表现。
papers.abstract_en: Visual Question Answering (VQA) has increasingly shifted from direct prediction tostep-by-step reasoning, driven by advances in Multi-modal Large Language Models(MLLMs) and Multi-modal Chain-of-Thought (MCoT). However, small MLLMs (S …

papers.title_en: Fine-Tuning Enhances Latent Metacognitive Capability in Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了大语言模型的元认知能力，即判断自身是否具备回答问题所需知识的能力。作者提出了“潜在元认知能力假设”，认为模型内部已存在支持自我评估的结构。通过微调实验，研究证明了微调能有效激活并增强这些潜在能力，使模型在面对未知问题时表现出更好的自我认知，为提升模型可靠性提供了新路径。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models are increasingly asked not only to answer questions, butalso to judge whether they know enough to answer. We test a latent metacognitivecapability hypothesis: models already contain internal structure supporting weak self …

papers.title_en: Rubric-Grounded Reinforcement Learning: Structured Judge Rewards for Generalizable Reasoning in Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型推理任务中奖励信号过于单一的问题，提出了基于评分量表（Rubric）的强化学习方法。该方法将奖励分解为多个加权且可验证的标准，利用LLM裁判进行细粒度评分，从而为模型提供“部分学分”式的优化信号。实验证明，这种结构化奖励能显著提升模型在复杂推理任务中的泛化能力和学习效率。
papers.abstract_en: We argue that decomposing reward into weighted, verifiable criteria and using anLLM judge to score them provides a partial-credit optimization signal: instead of abinary outcome or a single holistic score, each response is graded along multiple …

papers.title_en: Microscopy-informed structural connectivity mapping in the in vivo human brain via domain adaptation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对人类大脑结构连接制图的挑战，提出了一种基于领域自适应的方法。通过结合弥散磁共振成像（dMRI）与同脑高分辨率显微镜成像的跨尺度数据，该方法旨在将显微镜下的微观结构信息映射到活体成像中。研究的主要贡献在于利用领域自适应技术弥合了宏观成像与微观结构之间的鸿沟，显著提升了活体大脑结构连接制图的准确性和生物学解释力。
papers.abstract_en: Characterising human brain connectivity remains a major challenge in neuroscience.Multimodal datasets combining diffusion MRI with high-resolution microscopy in thesame brain offer a unique link between macroscopic imaging and microstructural …

papers.title_en: 3D radiomics profiling of thyroid tumors using micro-CT
papers.tldr: 本研究针对传统2D组织学在评估甲状腺肿瘤异质性方面的局限性，提出利用micro-CT技术进行3D放射组学分析。通过对肿瘤微架构进行精确的三维评估，该方法能够更全面地揭示肿瘤内部的复杂特征，为解决诊断不确定性和评估疾病进展提供了新的空间维度视角，是肿瘤精准诊断的重要补充。
papers.abstract_en: Tumor heterogeneity plays a central role in treatment resistance, diseaseprogression, and diagnostic uncertainty. However, it may be overlooked bytraditional 2D histology. Accurate 3D assessment of tumor microarchitecture is …

papers.title_en: Integration of habitat radiomics and 2.5 D deep features from 18F-FDG PET/CT for noninvasive prediction of PD-L1 TPS≥ 50% in non–small cell lung cancer
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在开发一种基于18F-FDG PET/CT的非侵入性影像框架，用于预测非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）中PD-L1的表达水平（TPS≥50%）。通过整合生境影像组学（habitat radiomics）与2.5D深度学习特征，该方法能够有效捕捉肿瘤内部的异质性。研究结果表明，这种多维度特征融合模型在预测PD-L1高表达方面具有显著效能，为临床制定个性化免疫治疗方案提供了重要的无创评估工具。
papers.abstract_en: Objective To develop and evaluate a noninvasive imaging framework based on 18 F-FDG PET/CT for estimating programmed death-ligand 1 (PD-L1) expression status innon–small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) by integrating habitat radiomics and 2.5 D deep …

papers.title_en: Dynamic feature interaction between multi-region radiomic and deep learning features for brain metastasis segmentation
papers.tldr: 针对脑转移瘤（BM）放疗中肿瘤边界模糊导致的分割难题，本研究提出了一种结合多区域影像组学特征与深度学习特征的动态交互方法。通过整合不同区域的纹理信息与深度神经网络的语义特征，该方法显著提升了肿瘤大体靶区（GTV）的分割精度，为精准放疗提供了更可靠的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate gross target volume (GTV) segmentation is essential for precisionradiotherapy in patients with brain metastases (BM). However, conventional deeplearning methods often struggle with ambiguous tumor boundaries due to their …

papers.title_en: nnU-Net-based whole-coronary pericoronary adipose tissue radiomics combined with clinical factors for predicting coronary plaque development in individuals with …
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在解决冠心病早期预测的难题，利用nnU-Net深度学习模型自动分割全冠状动脉周脂肪（PCAT）并提取影像组学特征。通过将PCAT影像组学特征与临床因素相结合，研究构建了一个预测冠状动脉斑块进展的综合模型。结果表明，该方法能显著提升斑块发展的预测准确性，为心血管风险评估提供了创新的影像学辅助手段。
papers.abstract_en: Background Effective early prediction of coronary artery disease remainschallenging. This study aims to investigate whether radiomic features of pericoronaryadipose tissue (PCAT) derived from the whole-coronary tree using nnU-Net …

papers.title_en: SAM foundation model and expert model cross prompting framework for semi-supervised medical image segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医学图像标注数据稀缺的问题，提出了一种结合SAM基础模型与专家模型的跨提示（Cross Prompting）半监督分割框架。该框架利用SAM强大的泛化能力与专家模型的领域知识，通过相互引导和提示增强模型在少量标注数据下的学习效果。实验证明，该方法在多种医学影像任务中表现优异，有效提升了半监督分割的准确性与鲁棒性，为基础模型在医疗领域的应用提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Semi-supervised segmentation holds significant potential in medical scenarios withlimited annotated data. In recent years, network perturbation has emerged as amainstream approach in semi-supervised learning. Among these methods, CNN …

papers.title_en: FABSVer: Faster Training and Better Self-Verification for LLM Mathematical Reasoning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在数学推理中自我验证能力不足的问题，提出了 FABSVer 框架。该方法旨在通过更高效的训练过程提升模型判断自身解题正确性的能力。FABSVer 优化了现有的自我验证训练流程，使模型在保持推理性能的同时，能够更准确地识别错误答案，显著提高了数学任务的可靠性和训练效率。
papers.abstract_en: While large language models have made significant progress in mathematicalreasoning, they remain unreliable at judging the correctness of their own solutions.Existing approaches that equip models with self-verification typically treat solution …

papers.title_en: LoMo: Local Modality Substitution for Deeper Vision-Language Fusion
papers.tldr: 本研究针对视觉语言模型在多模态融合深度上的不足，提出了LoMo（局部模态替换）方法。该方法通过在训练过程中对局部信息进行跨模态替换，促使模型更深入地理解图像与文本之间的语义对应关系。实验证明，LoMo能显著增强模型在复杂理解和推理任务中的表现，为实现更深层次的跨模态融合提供了有效的技术路径。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved substantial progress across a widerange of understanding and reasoning tasks, driven by large-scale image-texttraining aimed at multimodal fusion. Ideally, replacing a textual question with its …

papers.title_en: ClinicalMC: A Benchmark for Multi-Course Clinical Decision-Making with Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对现有医疗大模型评估基准多局限于单轮决策的问题，本文推出了 ClinicalMC 基准测试。该基准专注于多阶段临床决策场景，通过模拟真实的连续诊疗过程，全面评估模型在复杂医疗环境下的长期规划与动态决策能力。研究结果显示，尽管 LLM 在基础医疗知识上表现良好，但在处理多轮复杂决策时仍面临挑战，为未来医疗大模型的发展提供了重要方向。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) have been widely adopted in healthcare, yet theystill encounter significant challenges in complex clinical decision-making scenarios.Existing benchmarks primarily assess LLM performance in single-course settings …

papers.title_en: RL Excursions during Pre-Training: Re-examining Policy Optimization for LLM training
papers.tldr: 本研究挑战了LLM训练中仅在预训练和SFT之后应用强化学习（RL）的传统范式。作者通过从零开始训练模型，探索了在预训练阶段直接引入RL、SFT以及SFT+RL组合的效果。研究表明，在预训练过程中进行“RL偏移”可以有效提升模型性能，为优化LLM训练流程提供了新的视角和可能性。
papers.abstract_en: The standard LLM training pipeline applies reinforcement learning (RL) only after pre-training and supervised fine-tuning (SFT). We question this status quo by training aLLM from scratch and applying RL, SFT, and SFT followed by RL directly to …

papers.title_en: Does VLA Even Know the Basics? Measuring Commonsense and World Knowledge Retention in Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了具身视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在经过机器人数据微调后，是否仍能保留预训练阶段获得的常识和世界知识。通过对主流VLA模型进行评估，研究揭示了微调过程对模型通用认知能力的潜在损害，并提出了衡量知识保留程度的新基准，为构建更稳健的具身智能体提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Embodied Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are typically obtained by fine-tuning powerful pretrained VLMs on robotics data, yet it is unclear how muchcommonsense and factual knowledge they retain after adaptation. Failures on …

papers.title_en: Scaling Generative Foundation Models for Chest Radiography with Rectified Flow Transformers
papers.tldr: 本研究推出了首个在十亿参数规模下从零开始训练的胸部 X 光片生成基础模型。针对现有放射学 AI 模型在不同患者群体和机构间泛化能力差的问题，该研究采用了修正流变换器（Rectified Flow Transformers）架构。该模型不仅提升了合成影像的质量，还为医学影像的生成式预训练提供了新的基准，展示了大规模生成模型在医疗领域的应用潜力。
papers.abstract_en: We introduce the first generative foundation model for chest radiograph synthesistrained from scratch at the billion-parameter scale. Existing radiographic AI modelsoften suffer from poor generalisation across patient subpopulations, institutions, and …

papers.title_en: PerceptionDLM: Parallel Region Perception with Multimodal Diffusion Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对现有自回归多模态大模型在感知任务中效率低下的问题，本文提出 PerceptionDLM。该模型通过引入扩散语言模型（DLM），实现了对图像中多个区域描述的并行生成。PerceptionDLM 在区域描述和定位等任务上表现出色，不仅显著提高了推理速度，还保持了高水平的视觉理解能力，为高效多模态感知研究提供了新方向。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress invisual understanding tasks. However, most existing MLLMs rely on autoregressivegeneration, which limits their efficiency for perception tasks that require captioning …

papers.title_en: Scalable Training of Spatially Grounded 2D Vision-Language Models for Radiology
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了在无需手动空间标注的情况下，如何训练具有空间定位能力的放射学视觉语言模型。作者推出了RefRad2D，这是一个包含120万对CT和MR图像-文本对的大规模德英双语数据集。该研究通过利用自动生成的关联，实现了放射学领域视觉定位模型的可扩展训练，显著提升了模型在医学影像理解中的空间感知能力。
papers.abstract_en: We study how to train visually grounded vision-language models (VLMs) forradiology without manual spatial annotations. We introduce RefRad2D, a large-scalebilingual (German/English) dataset of 1.2 M CT and MR image-text pairs derived …
